headline: P&L exposure: ₹0 Cr direct P&L impact; future green revenue opportunity is speculative and contingent on market evolution.
what_matters: No P/E compression or margin erosion; future upside possible if green hydrogen revenues scale and are recognized by ESG indices.
Potential for lower cost of capital in future (EU Taxonomy/green bond eligibility), but no immediate bond spread change; FII flows unaffected short-term.
Triggers BRSR, CDP, TCFD, and GRI disclosure obligations, but no penalty or deadline pressure as event is routine capex, not a compliance breach.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹0 Cr direct P&L impact; future green revenue opportunity is speculative and contingent on market evolution.
